mpeg_o.importers.import_result
==============================

.. py:module:: mpeg_o.importers.import_result

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   ``ImportResult`` — lightweight in-memory container produced by importers.

   The main ``SpectralDataset`` class wraps an open HDF5 file, which would be
   awkward to construct from an importer that has no backing file yet. Instead,
   importers produce an :class:`ImportResult` that can be inspected in memory
   and then flushed to a real ``.mpgo`` file with :meth:`ImportResult.to_mpgo`.

   .. rubric:: Notes

   API status: Stable (Python-idiomatic helper; ObjC and Java use
   inline constructs).



Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.importers.import_result.ImportedSpectrum
   mpeg_o.importers.import_result.ImportedChromatogram
   mpeg_o.importers.import_result.ImportResult


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: ImportedSpectrum

   One decoded spectrum from an import-time XML parse.


   .. py:attribute:: mz_or_chemical_shift
      :type:  numpy.ndarray


   .. py:attribute:: intensity
      :type:  numpy.ndarray


   .. py:attribute:: retention_time
      :type:  float
      :value: 0.0



   .. py:attribute:: ms_level
      :type:  int
      :value: 1



   .. py:attribute:: polarity
      :type:  int
      :value: 0



   .. py:attribute:: precursor_mz
      :type:  float
      :value: 0.0



   .. py:attribute:: precursor_charge
      :type:  int
      :value: 0



.. py:class:: ImportedChromatogram

   One decoded chromatogram trace from mzML (M24).


   .. py:attribute:: retention_times
      :type:  numpy.ndarray


   .. py:attribute:: intensities
      :type:  numpy.ndarray


   .. py:attribute:: chromatogram_type
      :type:  int
      :value: 0



   .. py:attribute:: target_mz
      :type:  float
      :value: 0.0



   .. py:attribute:: precursor_mz
      :type:  float
      :value: 0.0



   .. py:attribute:: product_mz
      :type:  float
      :value: 0.0



.. py:class:: ImportResult

   Container returned by the mzML / nmrML importers.


   .. py:attribute:: title
      :type:  str
      :value: ''



   .. py:attribute:: isa_investigation_id
      :type:  str
      :value: ''



   .. py:attribute:: ms_spectra
      :type:  list[ImportedSpectrum]
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: nmr_spectra
      :type:  list[ImportedSpectrum]
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: chromatograms
      :type:  list[ImportedChromatogram]
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: nucleus_type
      :type:  str
      :value: ''



   .. py:attribute:: identifications
      :type:  list[mpeg_o.identification.Identification]
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: quantifications
      :type:  list[mpeg_o.quantification.Quantification]
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: provenance
      :type:  list[mpeg_o.provenance.ProvenanceRecord]
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: source_file
      :type:  str
      :value: ''



   .. py:method:: __iter__() -> Iterator[ImportedSpectrum]


   .. py:property:: spectrum_count
      :type: int



   .. py:method:: build_runs() -> dict[str, mpeg_o.spectral_dataset.WrittenRun]

      Convert the parsed spectra into ``WrittenRun`` buffers ready for
      :func:`SpectralDataset.write_minimal`.



   .. py:method:: to_mpgo(path: str | pathlib.Path, features: list[str] | None = None) -> pathlib.Path
